KidsPage.Title: My Child
KidsPage.Description: Discover our magical collection of children's books, short stories, and coloring books.
KidsPage.HeroTitle: Magical worlds to explore.
KidsPage.HeroDesc: Awaken their imagination with our selection of wonderful stories, original educational books, and creative coloring books.

SectionFeatures.BadgeSubtitle: A careful selection to help them grow with a smile.
SectionFeatures.StoryDesc: Tales that stimulate creativity and convey beautiful values.
SectionFeatures.LearnDesc: Discovering numbers, letters, and the world with great gentleness.
SectionFeatures.ColorDesc: Their favorite characters ready to come to life under their pencils.

SectionStories.Title:
Tales to dream
before sleeping.
SectionStories.Desc: Dive into a universe of adventures and wonderful tales. Fun stories with endearing animals and brave little heroes that will accompany your child's sweet nights.

SectionColoring.Title:
Let their creativity
express itself.
SectionColoring.Desc: Our coloring albums offer hours of entertainment and creation. Simple shapes for the little ones to playful mandalas for the older ones.

SectionLearning.Title:
From first letters
to great knowledge.
SectionLearning.Desc: We have selected educational books that make learning exciting. Alphabets, numbers, discovering the world: everything is designed to awaken their natural curiosity.

SectionWisdom.Title:
A little owl
full of wisdom.
SectionWisdom.Desc: Reading from an early age reinforces concentration and empathy. Our children's books are designed to be true traveling companions in their personal development.

SectionLibrary.Title:
Build their
own magic tower.
SectionLibrary.Desc: Every book added to their library is a seed planted in their mind. Create with them a wonderful space filled with beautiful colors and infinite knowledge.

CTA.Title: Ready for a new adventure?
CTA.Desc: Join thousands of parents and give your kids the gift of limitless imagination.

UsbPage.Title: USB Key
UsbPage.Description: The Riwaya educational USB key. Over 500 hours of educational content for children.
UsbPage.HeroDesc: 500+ hours of educational videos for your kids. No internet, no ads.
UsbPage.HeroFooterText: Cash on delivery · Delivery everywhere in Morocco
UsbPage.PromoDesc: A single investment for years of quality educational content.
UsbPage.CatalogDesc: Click on a card to see a free preview
UsbPage.CatalogFooter: + Hundreds of other episodes and exclusive bonuses included in the USB.

HowSteps.Step1Desc: Place your order. Delivery in 2-4 days anywhere in Morocco.
HowSteps.Step2Desc: Plug the key into your TV, PC, or tablet. No installation.
HowSteps.Step3Desc: Your child instantly accesses all the content, without Wi-Fi.

UsbPage.CtaTitle: Give the best to your child
UsbPage.CtaDesc: A single investment of 349 DH for years of learning.

Hero.Title: Our Story
Hero.Subtitle: Discover who we are and our mission to democratize reading in Morocco.

Quote.Text: A book is a dream that you hold in your hand.

Mission.Desc1: At Riwaya, we believe in the power of reading to transform lives. Our mission is to make books accessible, affordable, and available to everyone.
Mission.Desc2: We are building more than just a bookstore, we are building a community of passionate readers.

Passion.Title: Passion
Passion.Desc: The love of books is at the heart of everything we do.

Quality.Title: Quality
Quality.Desc: We carefully select each book in our catalog.

Trust.Title: Trust
Trust.Desc: We build lasting relationships with our readers.

Proximity.Title: Proximity
Proximity.Desc: Always listening to advise you on the best read.

Member1.Name: Ahmed Benali
Member1.Bio: Passionate about literature since a young age, Ahmed founded Riwaya to share this passion.

Member2.Name: Youssef El Idrissi
Member2.Bio: Youssef ensures that your experience on the platform is smooth and pleasant.

Member3.Name: Sara Benali
Member3.Bio: Sara selects the best titles and packs for our readers.

Member4.Name: Fatima Zahra
Member4.Bio: Fatima is always ready to help you and answer your questions.

ExpertHelp.Desc: A passionate team to guide you.

SafeArrival.Desc: Your books arrive in perfect condition.

CustomPack.BannerDesc: Select your favorite books and get an exclusive discount. Starting from 3 books!

Shipping.Question: What are the shipping times?
Shipping.Answer: We deliver within 24-48 hours in major cities (Casablanca, Rabat, Marrakech, Tangier) and 48-72 hours for other regions.

Payment.Question: What payment methods are accepted?
Payment.Answer: We currently only accept Cash on Delivery (COD) to ensure your complete satisfaction upon receipt.

Returns.Question: Can I return a book?
Returns.Answer: Yes, you have 3 days after delivery to request a return if the book is damaged or does not correspond to your order.

DeliveryCost.Question: How much does delivery cost?
DeliveryCost.Answer: Delivery is free for orders over 400 MAD. For orders below this amount, a flat fee of 35 MAD applies.

Returns.Title: Return Policy
Returns.Subtitle: Peace of Mind
Returns.Intro: We want you to love your reading experience. Here is how we handle returns.

Policy.Point1: You have 3 calendar days to report an issue.
Policy.Point2: The item must be unused and in the same condition that you received it.
Policy.Point3: Please contact us via the contact form or WhatsApp to initiate a return.
Policy.Point4: Refunds are processed after inspection of the returned item.
